grant_capacity: No dedicated grant staff (volunteers handle grants)
mission_statement: We protect patients because everyone will be a patient one day, and preventable harm can be reduced through proper training. Our work strengthens patient safety by expanding access to evidence-based clinical education. Through our fellowship program for clinicians from low- and middle-income countries, we screened more than 1,000 applicants and trained 47 fellows who are now applying their skills to reduce preventable harm in their hospitals. An estimated 26,200 patients each year will benefit from the knowledge and training these fellows have received and will continue to receive. This growing network of PSMF-trained professionals enhances clinical expertise, mentorship, and system capacity to build safer healthcare for all.
timeframe: Maximum one year from beginning to end or shorter
notes: A helpful feature would be the opportunity to identify grants that align with PSMF core values and mission specifically.
officers: MARK P DE RAAD LEFT DEC 2017
